title: sideritis incana var. nervosa
intro: Sideritis incana var. nervosa, commonly known as Mountain Tea, is a subspecies of the Sideritis incana plant, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is a wild herb native to the Mediterranean region, traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sideritis incana var. nervosa include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as supporting digestion and reducing stress. This plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns.
